name: Red Snapper (Mf)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 450 degrees Fahrenheit. Tear two pieces of parchment paper or aluminum foil, about 12 inches square.
Drizzle some olive oil in the center of each square and spread with your fingers. Place the filets, skin side down, over the olive oil on the foil and season with salt and pepper. Drizzle more olive oil over the fish, then top with tomatoes and fresh herbs. Add additional drizzles of olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Wrap the package tightly, deli-style. Set the package on a baking dish or sheet pan and bake for 30 minutes, or until tender.
While the snapper is cooking, make orange rice.
Yield: 2 servings
Busted by Gail Shermeyer  on Jul 12, 97
